text:
year. 
SHORT NAME: MDCD_MAND_CVRG_ADLT_POP_IND 
LONG NAME: MDCD_MAND_CVRG_ADLT_POP_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APL base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
This data element is triggered by a value of “01”-“09” or “72”-“75” in any instance of 
MC_PLAN_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_CD. 
These values are: 
01 = Parents and Other Caretaker Relatives 
02 = Transitional Medical Assistance 
03 = Extended Medicaid due to Earnings 
04 = Extended Medicaid due
